metadata.title: Unbunked — Fact-checking the news
metadata.description: Unbunked verifies the news claim by claim and assigns it a verdict, backed by sources.

common.tagline: Fact-checking the news, verified claim by claim

footer.tagline: Fact-checking the news, verified claim by claim.

verdicts.title: Our verdict scale
verdicts.subtitle: Every analysis is assigned one of these five verdicts.

reliable.label: Reliable
reliable.description: Solid, well-sourced and consistent with the facts.

nuanced.label: Nuanced
nuanced.description: Largely true, but incomplete or context-dependent.

biased.label: Biased
biased.description: Partial framing or selective use of the facts.

home.title: Unbunked's foundations are in place
home.body: Light/dark theme, internationalization and the verdict system are wired up. The article feed lands in the next step.
